texto: Were it not for the melanin in our skin, myoglobin in our muscles and haemoglobin in our blood, we would be the colour of mitochondria. And, if this were so, we would change colour when we exercised or ran out of breath, so that you could tell how energized someone was from his or her colour.
explicacao: Citação de Guy Brown sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Were it not for the melanin in our skin, myoglobin in our muscles and haemoglobin in our blood, w…” articula reflexao, biology, cells em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e cells.
